query:
INSERT INTO quiz_questions (lessonId, question, questionType, options, correctAnswer, questionOrder) VALUES
-- PAS201 Lesson 1: Biblical Foundations of Pastoral Care (360171)
(360171, 'The term pastor comes from the Latin word meaning:', 'multiple_choice', '["Teacher","Shepherd","Leader","Prophet"]', 'Shepherd', 1),
(360171, 'In John 10, Jesus describes Himself as:', 'multiple_choice', '["The hired hand","The Good Shepherd","The gatekeeper","The wolf"]', 'The Good Shepherd', 2),
(360171, 'Pastoral care in the Old Testament is exemplified by:', 'multiple_choice', '["King Saul","David as shepherd of Israel","Pharaoh","Goliath"]', 'David as shepherd of Israel', 3),
(360171, 'The primary responsibility of a pastor according to Acts 20:28 is to:', 'multiple_choice', '["Build buildings","Guard and feed the flock","Increase attendance","Raise funds"]', 'Guard and feed the flock', 4),
(360171, 'Ezekiel 34 condemns shepherds who:', 'multiple_choice', '["Feed the flock","Care for themselves rather than the sheep","Protect the weak","Seek the lost"]', 'Care for themselves rather than the sheep', 5),
(360171, 'The pastoral epistles include:', 'multiple_choice', '["Romans and Galatians","1 Timothy, 2 Timothy, and Titus","Matthew and Mark","Revelation"]', '1 Timothy, 2 Timothy, and Titus', 6),
(360171, 'According to 1 Peter 5:2-3, pastors should lead:', 'multiple_choice', '["By compulsion","Not for shameful gain but eagerly","By lording over others","For personal benefit"]', 'Not for shameful gain but eagerly', 7),
(360171, 'The Greek word poimaino means:', 'multiple_choice', '["To teach","To shepherd or tend","To preach","To baptize"]', 'To shepherd or tend', 8),
(360171, 'Jesus instruction to Peter in John 21 was to:', 'multiple_choice', '["Build a church building","Feed My sheep","Write a gospel","Travel to Rome"]', 'Feed My sheep', 9),
(360171, 'Pastoral care involves caring for peoples:', 'multiple_choice', '["Physical needs only","Spiritual, emotional, and practical needs","Financial needs only","Educational needs only"]', 'Spiritual, emotional, and practical needs', 10),
(360171, 'Explain the biblical foundation for pastoral ministry and the shepherds responsibilities.', 'short_answer', '[]', 'Pastoral ministry is grounded in Christs example as the Good Shepherd and involves feeding, protecting, and guiding the flock.', 11),

-- PAS201 Lesson 2: The Shepherds Heart (360172)
(360172, 'The shepherds heart is characterized by:', 'multiple_choice', '["Ambition for power","Compassion and sacrificial love","Self-promotion","Indifference"]', 'Compassion and sacrificial love', 1),
(360172, 'Jesus was moved with compassion when He saw crowds as:', 'multiple_choice', '["Potential donors","Sheep without a shepherd","Entertainment","Competition"]', 'Sheep without a shepherd', 2),
(360172, 'A pastors character is more important than:', 'multiple_choice', '["Nothing","Skills and techniques alone","Prayer","Scripture knowledge"]', 'Skills and techniques alone', 3),
(360172, 'The fruit of the Spirit in Galatians 5 includes:', 'multiple_choice', '["Pride and ambition","Love, joy, peace, patience","Wealth and success","Popularity"]', 'Love, joy, peace, patience', 4),
(360172, 'Integrity in pastoral ministry means:', 'multiple_choice', '["Appearing good publicly","Consistency between public and private life","Hiding weaknesses","Perfect performance"]', 'Consistency between public and private life', 5),
(360172, 'Humility in leadership is demonstrated by:', 'multiple_choice', '["Self-promotion","Serving others and acknowledging dependence on God","Demanding respect","Avoiding accountability"]', 'Serving others and acknowledging dependence on God', 6),
(360172, 'A pastor should guard against:', 'multiple_choice', '["Prayer","Burnout and moral failure","Scripture study","Fellowship"]', 'Burnout and moral failure', 7),
(360172, 'The call to pastoral ministry should be confirmed by:', 'multiple_choice', '["Personal desire alone","Internal call and external affirmation by the church","Financial need","Family pressure"]', 'Internal call and external affirmation by the church', 8),
(360172, 'Pastoral self-care includes:', 'multiple_choice', '["Ignoring personal needs","Rest, spiritual disciplines, and healthy relationships","Constant work","Isolation"]', 'Rest, spiritual disciplines, and healthy relationships', 9),
(360172, 'The pastors primary relationship should be with:', 'multiple_choice', '["The congregation","God through Christ","Denominational leaders","Community leaders"]', 'God through Christ', 10),
(360172, 'Describe the essential character qualities of an effective pastor and how they are developed.', 'short_answer', '[]', 'Essential qualities include love, integrity, humility, and compassion, developed through spiritual disciplines and dependence on God.', 11),

-- PAS201 Lesson 3: Pastoral Counseling Basics (360173)
(360173, 'Biblical counseling is centered on:', 'multiple_choice', '["Human wisdom alone","Scripture and the sufficiency of Christ","Secular psychology only","Personal opinions"]', 'Scripture and the sufficiency of Christ', 1),
(360173, 'Active listening involves:', 'multiple_choice', '["Interrupting frequently","Full attention, empathy, and understanding","Planning your response","Judging quickly"]', 'Full attention, empathy, and understanding', 2),
(360173, 'Confidentiality in counseling should be broken when:', 'multiple_choice', '["Never","There is danger to self or others","The person is annoying","You want to share"]', 'There is danger to self or others', 3),
(360173, 'The goal of pastoral counseling is:', 'multiple_choice', '["Dependence on the counselor","Spiritual growth and Christlikeness","Feeling good","Avoiding problems"]', 'Spiritual growth and Christlikeness', 4),
(360173, 'Empathy in counseling means:', 'multiple_choice', '["Agreeing with everything","Understanding and sharing anothers feelings","Sympathy only","Detachment"]', 'Understanding and sharing anothers feelings', 5),
(360173, 'Appropriate boundaries in pastoral counseling include:', 'multiple_choice', '["No boundaries needed","Time limits, physical boundaries, and referral when needed","Unlimited availability","Personal relationships"]', 'Time limits, physical boundaries, and referral when needed', 6),
(360173, 'The Holy Spirit in counseling:', 'multiple_choice', '["Is unnecessary","Guides, convicts, and transforms","Is optional","Works only through professionals"]', 'Guides, convicts, and transforms', 7),
(360173, 'When should a pastor refer to a professional counselor?', 'multiple_choice', '["Never","When issues exceed pastoral training or require specialized help","Always","Only for non-Christians"]', 'When issues exceed pastoral training or require specialized help', 8),
(360173, 'Prayer in pastoral counseling:', 'multiple_choice', '["Is unprofessional","Is essential and powerful","Should be avoided","Is only for emergencies"]', 'Is essential and powerful', 9),
(360173, 'Scripture in counseling should be used:', 'multiple_choice', '["As a weapon","Wisely, appropriately, and with compassion","Never","Only for proof-texting"]', 'Wisely, appropriately, and with compassion', 10),
(360173, 'Explain the distinctives of biblical pastoral counseling and its goals.', 'short_answer', '[]', 'Biblical counseling is Christ-centered, Scripture-based, and aims for spiritual transformation and Christlikeness.', 11),

-- PAS201 Lesson 4: Crisis Intervention (360174)
(360174, 'A crisis is characterized by:', 'multiple_choice', '["Normal daily stress","Overwhelming circumstances that exceed coping ability","Minor inconvenience","Routine problems"]', 'Overwhelming circumstances that exceed coping ability', 1),
(360174, 'The first priority in crisis intervention is:', 'multiple_choice', '["Theological instruction","Safety and stabilization","Long-term planning","Blame assignment"]', 'Safety and stabilization', 2),
(360174, 'Trauma can result from:', 'multiple_choice', '["Only physical injury","Physical, emotional, or spiritual wounds","Minor setbacks","Normal life events"]', 'Physical, emotional, or spiritual wounds', 3),
(360174, 'The ministry of presence means:', 'multiple_choice', '["Giving advice immediately","Being with someone in their pain","Avoiding difficult situations","Sending cards"]', 'Being with someone in their pain', 4),
(360174, 'PTSD stands for:', 'multiple_choice', '["Personal Trauma Stress Disorder","Post-Traumatic Stress Disorder","Pastoral Training and Support Division","None of the above"]', 'Post-Traumatic Stress Disorder', 5),
(360174, 'In crisis, people often need:', 'multiple_choice', '["Immediate solutions","Listening, support, and practical help","Criticism","To be left alone"]', 'Listening, support, and practical help', 6),
(360174, 'Suicide risk should be:', 'multiple_choice', '["Ignored","Taken seriously and assessed directly","Minimized","Handled alone"]', 'Taken seriously and assessed directly', 7),
(360174, 'The church community in crisis provides:', 'multiple_choice', '["Nothing helpful","Support, prayer, and practical assistance","Judgment","Isolation"]', 'Support, prayer, and practical assistance', 8),
(360174, 'Self-care for crisis responders includes:', 'multiple_choice', '["Ignoring personal impact","Debriefing, rest, and support","Constant availability","Suppressing emotions"]', 'Debriefing, rest, and support', 9),
(360174, 'Gods presence in crisis is:', 'multiple_choice', '["Absent","A source of comfort and hope","Irrelevant","Punitive"]', 'A source of comfort and hope', 10),
(360174, 'Describe the pastoral approach to crisis intervention and the role of the faith community.', 'short_answer', '[]', 'Crisis intervention involves presence, safety, support, and mobilizing the faith community for practical and spiritual care.', 11),

-- PAS201 Lesson 5: Grief and Loss (360175)
(360175, 'Grief is a normal response to:', 'multiple_choice', '["Only death","Any significant loss","Weakness","Sin"]', 'Any significant loss', 1),
(360175, 'The stages of grief model was developed by:', 'multiple_choice', '["Sigmund Freud","Elisabeth Kubler-Ross","Carl Jung","Billy Graham"]', 'Elisabeth Kubler-Ross', 2),
(360175, 'Lament in Scripture demonstrates:', 'multiple_choice', '["Lack of faith","Honest expression of grief to God","Weakness","Sin"]', 'Honest expression of grief to God', 3),
(360175, 'Jesus response to death at Lazarus tomb was:', 'multiple_choice', '["Indifference","He wept","Anger at the family","Immediate resurrection"]', 'He wept', 4),
(360175, 'Complicated grief may require:', 'multiple_choice', '["No intervention","Professional help and extended support","Criticism","Avoidance"]', 'Professional help and extended support', 5),
(360175, 'The Christian hope in grief is based on:', 'multiple_choice', '["Denial of death","The resurrection of Christ and eternal life","Positive thinking","Forgetting the deceased"]', 'The resurrection of Christ and eternal life', 6),
(360175, 'Ministry to the bereaved includes:', 'multiple_choice', '["Avoiding the topic","Presence, listening, and ongoing support","Quick fixes","Cliches"]', 'Presence, listening, and ongoing support', 7),
(360175, 'Grief has no set:', 'multiple_choice', '["Emotions","Timeline - it varies for each person","Stages","Impact"]', 'Timeline - it varies for each person', 8),
(360175, 'Memorial services should:', 'multiple_choice', '["Avoid mentioning the deceased","Honor the deceased and point to Christ","Be as short as possible","Focus on the pastor"]', 'Honor the deceased and point to Christ', 9),
(360175, 'Supporting grieving children requires:', 'multiple_choice', '["Treating them like adults","Age-appropriate honesty and ongoing support","Hiding death from them","Ignoring their grief"]', 'Age-appropriate honesty and ongoing support', 10),
(360175, 'Explain the pastoral role in ministering to those experiencing grief and loss.', 'short_answer', '[]', 'Pastoral grief ministry involves presence, listening, pointing to Christian hope, and providing ongoing support through the grief journey.', 11),

-- SPR201 Lesson 1: Biblical Foundation of Spiritual Gifts (360181)
(360181, 'Spiritual gifts are given by:', 'multiple_choice', '["Human effort","The Holy Spirit","Natural talent","Education"]', 'The Holy Spirit', 1),
(360181, 'The purpose of spiritual gifts is:', 'multiple_choice', '["Personal glory","Building up the body of Christ","Competition","Entertainment"]', 'Building up the body of Christ', 2),
(360181, 'According to 1 Corinthians 12, every believer has:', 'multiple_choice', '["No gifts","At least one spiritual gift","All gifts","Only one gift"]', 'At least one spiritual gift', 3),
(360181, 'The Greek word charisma means:', 'multiple_choice', '["Personality","Grace gift","Natural ability","Talent"]', 'Grace gift', 4),
(360181, 'Spiritual gifts differ from natural talents in their:', 'multiple_choice', '["Usefulness","Source and purpose for kingdom work","Value","Visibility"]', 'Source and purpose for kingdom work', 5),
(360181, 'The primary passages on spiritual gifts are found in:', 'multiple_choice', '["Genesis and Exodus","Romans 12, 1 Corinthians 12, Ephesians 4","Revelation","Psalms"]', 'Romans 12, 1 Corinthians 12, Ephesians 4', 6),
(360181, 'Love is essential in exercising gifts because:', 'multiple_choice', '["It is optional","Without love, gifts are meaningless","Love replaces gifts","It is just nice"]', 'Without love, gifts are meaningless', 7),
(360181, 'The body metaphor in 1 Corinthians 12 teaches:', 'multiple_choice', '["Some members are unnecessary","All members are needed and interdependent","Competition is good","Uniformity is the goal"]', 'All members are needed and interdependent', 8),
(360181, 'Spiritual gifts should be used with:', 'multiple_choice', '["Pride","Humility and for others benefit","Self-promotion","Competition"]', 'Humility and for others benefit', 9),
(360181, 'The distribution of gifts is determined by:', 'multiple_choice', '["Personal choice","The Holy Spirit as He wills","Church leaders","Popular vote"]', 'The Holy Spirit as He wills', 10),
(360181, 'Explain the biblical basis for spiritual gifts and their purpose in the church.', 'short_answer', '[]', 'Spiritual gifts are grace-given abilities from the Holy Spirit for building up the body of Christ and serving others.', 11),

-- SPR201 Lesson 2: The Motivational Gifts - Romans 12 (360182)
(360182, 'The gifts in Romans 12 are often called:', 'multiple_choice', '["Sign gifts","Motivational or service gifts","Leadership gifts","Miraculous gifts"]', 'Motivational or service gifts', 1),
(360182, 'The gift of prophecy in Romans 12 involves:', 'multiple_choice', '["Only predicting the future","Speaking Gods truth to edify and exhort","Fortune telling","Personal opinions"]', 'Speaking Gods truth to edify and exhort', 2),
(360182, 'The gift of serving emphasizes:', 'multiple_choice', '["Public recognition","Meeting practical needs of others","Self-promotion","Leadership positions"]', 'Meeting practical needs of others', 3),
(360182, 'The gift of teaching involves:', 'multiple_choice', '["Entertainment","Explaining and applying Scripture clearly","Personal stories only","Avoiding doctrine"]', 'Explaining and applying Scripture clearly', 4),
(360182, 'The gift of exhortation focuses on:', 'multiple_choice', '["Criticism","Encouraging and motivating others","Condemnation","Judgment"]', 'Encouraging and motivating others', 5),
(360182, 'The gift of giving should be exercised with:', 'multiple_choice', '["Reluctance","Generosity and cheerfulness","Expectation of return","Public display"]', 'Generosity and cheerfulness', 6),
(360182, 'The gift of leadership involves:', 'multiple_choice', '["Domination","Guiding and organizing with diligence","Passivity","Avoiding responsibility"]', 'Guiding and organizing with diligence', 7),
(360182, 'The gift of mercy is shown through:', 'multiple_choice', '["Judgment","Compassionate care for those suffering","Indifference","Criticism"]', 'Compassionate care for those suffering', 8),
(360182, 'Romans 12:6 says gifts differ according to:', 'multiple_choice', '["Personal preference","The grace given to us","Our effort","Church size"]', 'The grace given to us', 9),
(360182, 'Using gifts in proportion to faith means:', 'multiple_choice', '["Limiting God","Exercising gifts according to our faith and calling","Comparing with others","Overstepping boundaries"]', 'Exercising gifts according to our faith and calling', 10),
(360182, 'Describe the motivational gifts in Romans 12 and how they function in the church body.', 'short_answer', '[]', 'The Romans 12 gifts are motivational abilities that drive how believers serve, including prophecy, serving, teaching, exhorting, giving, leading, and showing mercy.', 11),

-- SPR201 Lesson 3: The Ministry Gifts - 1 Corinthians 12 (360183)
(360183, 'The gifts in 1 Corinthians 12 include:', 'multiple_choice', '["Only teaching","Word of wisdom, healing, tongues, and others","Only prophecy","Natural talents"]', 'Word of wisdom, healing, tongues, and others', 1),
(360183, 'The word of wisdom involves:', 'multiple_choice', '["Human intelligence","Supernatural insight for specific situations","Academic knowledge","Common sense only"]', 'Supernatural insight for specific situations', 2),
(360183, 'The word of knowledge refers to:', 'multiple_choice', '["General education","Supernatural revelation of facts","Book learning","Memory skills"]', 'Supernatural revelation of facts', 3),
(360183, 'The gift of faith is:', 'multiple_choice', '["Saving faith","Extraordinary trust in God for specific situations","Normal belief","Doubt"]', 'Extraordinary trust in God for specific situations', 4),
(360183, 'Gifts of healing are:', 'multiple_choice', '["Medical training","Supernatural ability to bring physical or emotional healing","Always successful","Under human control"]', 'Supernatural ability to bring physical or emotional healing', 5),
(360183, 'The gift of miracles involves:', 'multiple_choice', '["Magic tricks","Supernatural acts of power","Natural events","Human ability"]', 'Supernatural acts of power', 6),
(360183, 'Discerning of spirits enables believers to:', 'multiple_choice', '["Judge others","Distinguish between divine, human, and demonic sources","Ignore spiritual realities","Condemn people"]', 'Distinguish between divine, human, and demonic sources', 7),
(360183, 'Speaking in tongues in 1 Corinthians 12 is:', 'multiple_choice', '["Required for all","A spiritual gift for some believers","The only evidence of the Spirit","Meaningless"]', 'A spiritual gift for some believers', 8),
(360183, 'Interpretation of tongues:', 'multiple_choice', '["Is unnecessary","Makes tongues edifying in corporate worship","Is automatic","Replaces tongues"]', 'Makes tongues edifying in corporate worship', 9),
(360183, 'Paul emphasizes that not all have:', 'multiple_choice', '["Any gifts","The same gifts - diversity is Gods design","Value","Purpose"]', 'The same gifts - diversity is Gods design', 10),
(360183, 'Explain the manifestation gifts in 1 Corinthians 12 and guidelines for their use.', 'short_answer', '[]', 'The manifestation gifts are supernatural abilities given by the Spirit for ministry, to be used in love and order for edification.', 11),

-- SPR201 Lesson 4: The Leadership Gifts - Ephesians 4 (360184)
(360184, 'The Ephesians 4 gifts are given to:', 'multiple_choice', '["All believers equally","Specific individuals for church leadership","Only pastors","No one today"]', 'Specific individuals for church leadership', 1),
(360184, 'Apostles in Ephesians 4 are:', 'multiple_choice', '["Only the Twelve","Those sent to establish and oversee churches","Extinct","Unimportant"]', 'Those sent to establish and oversee churches', 2),
(360184, 'Prophets in Ephesians 4:', 'multiple_choice', '["Only predict the future","Speak Gods word to edify, exhort, and comfort","Are no longer needed","Replace Scripture"]', 'Speak Gods word to edify, exhort, and comfort', 3),
(360184, 'Evangelists are gifted to:', 'multiple_choice', '["Only preach to Christians","Proclaim the gospel and win the lost","Stay in one location","Avoid non-believers"]', 'Proclaim the gospel and win the lost', 4),
(360184, 'Pastors in Ephesians 4 are:', 'multiple_choice', '["Hired employees","Shepherds who care for and feed the flock","Optional","Only administrators"]', 'Shepherds who care for and feed the flock', 5),
(360184, 'Teachers in Ephesians 4:', 'multiple_choice', '["Share opinions","Explain and apply Scripture for understanding","Entertain","Avoid doctrine"]', 'Explain and apply Scripture for understanding', 6),
(360184, 'The purpose of these leadership gifts is to:', 'multiple_choice', '["Create hierarchy","Equip the saints for ministry","Control the church","Gain power"]', 'Equip the saints for ministry', 7),
(360184, 'The goal is for the body to reach:', 'multiple_choice', '["Numerical growth only","Unity and maturity in Christ","Entertainment","Comfort"]', 'Unity and maturity in Christ', 8),
(360184, 'Pastor-teacher may be:', 'multiple_choice', '["Two separate gifts","One combined gift","Neither","Outdated"]', 'One combined gift', 9),
(360184, 'These gifts continue until:', 'multiple_choice', '["The apostles died","The church reaches full maturity in Christ","They are no longer needed","The pastor retires"]', 'The church reaches full maturity in Christ', 10),
(360184, 'Explain the leadership gifts in Ephesians 4 and their role in equipping the church.', 'short_answer', '[]', 'The Ephesians 4 gifts are leadership roles given to equip believers for ministry and build up the body toward maturity in Christ.', 11),

-- SPR201 Lesson 5: Discovering Your Spiritual Gifts (360185)
(360185, 'Discovering your spiritual gifts involves:', 'multiple_choice', '["Taking one test","Prayer, study, experience, and confirmation","Guessing","Ignoring the topic"]', 'Prayer, study, experience, and confirmation', 1),
(360185, 'Spiritual gift assessments are:', 'multiple_choice', '["Infallible","Helpful tools but not definitive","Unnecessary","The only way to know"]', 'Helpful tools but not definitive', 2),
(360185, 'Serving in various ministries helps:', 'multiple_choice', '["Nothing","Discover where your gifts are effective","Waste time","Avoid commitment"]', 'Discover where your gifts are effective', 3),
(360185, 'Confirmation from others is important because:', 'multiple_choice', '["It is optional","Others can see gifts we may not recognize","It replaces personal discernment","It is the only factor"]', 'Others can see gifts we may not recognize', 4),
(360185, 'Spiritual gifts should align with:', 'multiple_choice', '["Personal ambition only","Your passions and the churchs needs","Financial gain","Popularity"]', 'Your passions and the churchs needs', 5),
(360185, 'Developing your gifts requires:', 'multiple_choice', '["No effort","Practice, training, and faithful use","Ignoring them","Waiting for perfection"]', 'Practice, training, and faithful use', 6),
(360185, 'Every believer is called to:', 'multiple_choice', '["Only receive ministry","Use their gifts to serve others","Avoid ministry","Wait for a special calling"]', 'Use their gifts to serve others', 7),
(360185, 'Gifts can be neglected by:', 'multiple_choice', '["Using them","Failing to exercise and develop them","Prayer","Study"]', 'Failing to exercise and develop them', 8),
(360185, 'The church benefits when:', 'multiple_choice', '["Only leaders serve","All members use their gifts","Gifts are hidden","Competition exists"]', 'All members use their gifts', 9),
(360185, 'Stewardship of gifts means:', 'multiple_choice', '["Ignoring them","Faithfully using what God has given","Hoarding abilities","Self-promotion"]', 'Faithfully using what God has given', 10),
(360185, 'Describe the process of discovering and developing your spiritual gifts for effective ministry.', 'short_answer', '[]', 'Discovering gifts involves prayer, study, experimentation, and confirmation, followed by faithful development and use for Gods glory.', 11);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2KiCrCqNDFcXt7P.577d1a63eeb5 --database P2Dpw9MQsmxzdUQCfGjV6b --execute INSERT INTO quiz_questions (lessonId, question, questionType, options, correctAnswer, questionOrder) VALUES
-- PAS201 Lesson 1: Biblical Foundations of Pastoral Care (360171)
(360171, 'The term pastor comes from the Latin word meaning:', 'multiple_choice', '["Teacher","Shepherd","Leader","Prophet"]', 'Shepherd', 1),
(360171, 'In John 10, Jesus describes Himself as:', 'multiple_choice', '["The hired hand","The Good Shepherd","The gatekeeper","The wolf"]', 'The Good Shepherd', 2),
(360171, 'Pastoral care in the Old Testament is exemplified by:', 'multiple_choice', '["King Saul","David as shepherd of Israel","Pharaoh","Goliath"]', 'David as shepherd of Israel', 3),
(360171, 'The primary responsibility of a pastor according to Acts 20:28 is to:', 'multiple_choice', '["Build buildings","Guard and feed the flock","Increase attendance","Raise funds"]', 'Guard and feed the flock', 4),
(360171, 'Ezekiel 34 condemns shepherds who:', 'multiple_choice', '["Feed the flock","Care for themselves rather than the sheep","Protect the weak","Seek the lost"]', 'Care for themselves rather than the sheep', 5),
(360171, 'The pastoral epistles include:', 'multiple_choice', '["Romans and Galatians","1 Timothy, 2 Timothy, and Titus","Matthew and Mark","Revelation"]', '1 Timothy, 2 Timothy, and Titus', 6),
(360171, 'According to 1 Peter 5:2-3, pastors should lead:', 'multiple_choice', '["By compulsion","Not for shameful gain but eagerly","By lording over others","For personal benefit"]', 'Not for shameful gain but eagerly', 7),
(360171, 'The Greek word poimaino means:', 'multiple_choice', '["To teach","To shepherd or tend","To preach","To baptize"]', 'To shepherd or tend', 8),
(360171, 'Jesus instruction to Peter in John 21 was to:', 'multiple_choice', '["Build a church building","Feed My sheep","Write a gospel","Travel to Rome"]', 'Feed My sheep', 9),
(360171, 'Pastoral care involves caring for peoples:', 'multiple_choice', '["Physical needs only","Spiritual, emotional, and practical needs","Financial needs only","Educational needs only"]', 'Spiritual, emotional, and practical needs', 10),
(360171, 'Explain the biblical foundation for pastoral ministry and the shepherds responsibilities.', 'short_answer', '[]', 'Pastoral ministry is grounded in Christs example as the Good Shepherd and involves feeding, protecting, and guiding the flock.', 11),

-- PAS201 Lesson 2: The Shepherds Heart (360172)
(360172, 'The shepherds heart is characterized by:', 'multiple_choice', '["Ambition for power","Compassion and sacrificial love","Self-promotion","Indifference"]', 'Compassion and sacrificial love', 1),
(360172, 'Jesus was moved with compassion when He saw crowds as:', 'multiple_choice', '["Potential donors","Sheep without a shepherd","Entertainment","Competition"]', 'Sheep without a shepherd', 2),
(360172, 'A pastors character is more important than:', 'multiple_choice', '["Nothing","Skills and techniques alone","Prayer","Scripture knowledge"]', 'Skills and techniques alone', 3),
(360172, 'The fruit of the Spirit in Galatians 5 includes:', 'multiple_choice', '["Pride and ambition","Love, joy, peace, patience","Wealth and success","Popularity"]', 'Love, joy, peace, patience', 4),
(360172, 'Integrity in pastoral ministry means:', 'multiple_choice', '["Appearing good publicly","Consistency between public and private life","Hiding weaknesses","Perfect performance"]', 'Consistency between public and private life', 5),
(360172, 'Humility in leadership is demonstrated by:', 'multiple_choice', '["Self-promotion","Serving others and acknowledging dependence on God","Demanding respect","Avoiding accountability"]', 'Serving others and acknowledging dependence on God', 6),
(360172, 'A pastor should guard against:', 'multiple_choice', '["Prayer","Burnout and moral failure","Scripture study","Fellowship"]', 'Burnout and moral failure', 7),
(360172, 'The call to pastoral ministry should be confirmed by:', 'multiple_choice', '["Personal desire alone","Internal call and external affirmation by the church","Financial need","Family pressure"]', 'Internal call and external affirmation by the church', 8),
(360172, 'Pastoral self-care includes:', 'multiple_choice', '["Ignoring personal needs","Rest, spiritual disciplines, and healthy relationships","Constant work","Isolation"]', 'Rest, spiritual disciplines, and healthy relationships', 9),
(360172, 'The pastors primary relationship should be with:', 'multiple_choice', '["The congregation","God through Christ","Denominational leaders","Community leaders"]', 'God through Christ', 10),
(360172, 'Describe the essential character qualities of an effective pastor and how they are developed.', 'short_answer', '[]', 'Essential qualities include love, integrity, humility, and compassion, developed through spiritual disciplines and dependence on God.', 11),

-- PAS201 Lesson 3: Pastoral Counseling Basics (360173)
(360173, 'Biblical counseling is centered on:', 'multiple_choice', '["Human wisdom alone","Scripture and the sufficiency of Christ","Secular psychology only","Personal opinions"]', 'Scripture and the sufficiency of Christ', 1),
(360173, 'Active listening involves:', 'multiple_choice', '["Interrupting frequently","Full attention, empathy, and understanding","Planning your response","Judging quickly"]', 'Full attention, empathy, and understanding', 2),
(360173, 'Confidentiality in counseling should be broken when:', 'multiple_choice', '["Never","There is danger to self or others","The person is annoying","You want to share"]', 'There is danger to self or others', 3),
(360173, 'The goal of pastoral counseling is:', 'multiple_choice', '["Dependence on the counselor","Spiritual growth and Christlikeness","Feeling good","Avoiding problems"]', 'Spiritual growth and Christlikeness', 4),
(360173, 'Empathy in counseling means:', 'multiple_choice', '["Agreeing with everything","Understanding and sharing anothers feelings","Sympathy only","Detachment"]', 'Understanding and sharing anothers feelings', 5),
(360173, 'Appropriate boundaries in pastoral counseling include:', 'multiple_choice', '["No boundaries needed","Time limits, physical boundaries, and referral when needed","Unlimited availability","Personal relationships"]', 'Time limits, physical boundaries, and referral when needed', 6),
(360173, 'The Holy Spirit in counseling:', 'multiple_choice', '["Is unnecessary","Guides, convicts, and transforms","Is optional","Works only through professionals"]', 'Guides, convicts, and transforms', 7),
(360173, 'When should a pastor refer to a professional counselor?', 'multiple_choice', '["Never","When issues exceed pastoral training or require specialized help","Always","Only for non-Christians"]', 'When issues exceed pastoral training or require specialized help', 8),
(360173, 'Prayer in pastoral counseling:', 'multiple_choice', '["Is unprofessional","Is essential and powerful","Should be avoided","Is only for emergencies"]', 'Is essential and powerful', 9),
(360173, 'Scripture in counseling should be used:', 'multiple_choice', '["As a weapon","Wisely, appropriately, and with compassion","Never","Only for proof-texting"]', 'Wisely, appropriately, and with compassion', 10),
(360173, 'Explain the distinctives of biblical pastoral counseling and its goals.', 'short_answer', '[]', 'Biblical counseling is Christ-centered, Scripture-based, and aims for spiritual transformation and Christlikeness.', 11),

-- PAS201 Lesson 4: Crisis Intervention (360174)
(360174, 'A crisis is characterized by:', 'multiple_choice', '["Normal daily stress","Overwhelming circumstances that exceed coping ability","Minor inconvenience","Routine problems"]', 'Overwhelming circumstances that exceed coping ability', 1),
(360174, 'The first priority in crisis intervention is:', 'multiple_choice', '["Theological instruction","Safety and stabilization","Long-term planning","Blame assignment"]', 'Safety and stabilization', 2),
(360174, 'Trauma can result from:', 'multiple_choice', '["Only physical injury","Physical, emotional, or spiritual wounds","Minor setbacks","Normal life events"]', 'Physical, emotional, or spiritual wounds', 3),
(360174, 'The ministry of presence means:', 'multiple_choice', '["Giving advice immediately","Being with someone in their pain","Avoiding difficult situations","Sending cards"]', 'Being with someone in their pain', 4),
(360174, 'PTSD stands for:', 'multiple_choice', '["Personal Trauma Stress Disorder","Post-Traumatic Stress Disorder","Pastoral Training and Support Division","None of the above"]', 'Post-Traumatic Stress Disorder', 5),
(360174, 'In crisis, people often need:', 'multiple_choice', '["Immediate solutions","Listening, support, and practical help","Criticism","To be left alone"]', 'Listening, support, and practical help', 6),
(360174, 'Suicide risk should be:', 'multiple_choice', '["Ignored","Taken seriously and assessed directly","Minimized","Handled alone"]', 'Taken seriously and assessed directly', 7),
(360174, 'The church community in crisis provides:', 'multiple_choice', '["Nothing helpful","Support, prayer, and practical assistance","Judgment","Isolation"]', 'Support, prayer, and practical assistance', 8),
(360174, 'Self-care for crisis responders includes:', 'multiple_choice', '["Ignoring personal impact","Debriefing, rest, and support","Constant availability","Suppressing emotions"]', 'Debriefing, rest, and support', 9),
(360174, 'Gods presence in crisis is:', 'multiple_choice', '["Absent","A source of comfort and hope","Irrelevant","Punitive"]', 'A source of comfort and hope', 10),
(360174, 'Describe the pastoral approach to crisis intervention and the role of the faith community.', 'short_answer', '[]', 'Crisis intervention involves presence, safety, support, and mobilizing the faith community for practical and spiritual care.', 11),

-- PAS201 Lesson 5: Grief and Loss (360175)
(360175, 'Grief is a normal response to:', 'multiple_choice', '["Only death","Any significant loss","Weakness","Sin"]', 'Any significant loss', 1),
(360175, 'The stages of grief model was developed by:', 'multiple_choice', '["Sigmund Freud","Elisabeth Kubler-Ross","Carl Jung","Billy Graham"]', 'Elisabeth Kubler-Ross', 2),
(360175, 'Lament in Scripture demonstrates:', 'multiple_choice', '["Lack of faith","Honest expression of grief to God","Weakness","Sin"]', 'Honest expression of grief to God', 3),
(360175, 'Jesus response to death at Lazarus tomb was:', 'multiple_choice', '["Indifference","He wept","Anger at the family","Immediate resurrection"]', 'He wept', 4),
(360175, 'Complicated grief may require:', 'multiple_choice', '["No intervention","Professional help and extended support","Criticism","Avoidance"]', 'Professional help and extended support', 5),
(360175, 'The Christian hope in grief is based on:', 'multiple_choice', '["Denial of death","The resurrection of Christ and eternal life","Positive thinking","Forgetting the deceased"]', 'The resurrection of Christ and eternal life', 6),
(360175, 'Ministry to the bereaved includes:', 'multiple_choice', '["Avoiding the topic","Presence, listening, and ongoing support","Quick fixes","Cliches"]', 'Presence, listening, and ongoing support', 7),
(360175, 'Grief has no set:', 'multiple_choice', '["Emotions","Timeline - it varies for each person","Stages","Impact"]', 'Timeline - it varies for each person', 8),
(360175, 'Memorial services should:', 'multiple_choice', '["Avoid mentioning the deceased","Honor the deceased and point to Christ","Be as short as possible","Focus on the pastor"]', 'Honor the deceased and point to Christ', 9),
(360175, 'Supporting grieving children requires:', 'multiple_choice', '["Treating them like adults","Age-appropriate honesty and ongoing support","Hiding death from them","Ignoring their grief"]', 'Age-appropriate honesty and ongoing support', 10),
(360175, 'Explain the pastoral role in ministering to those experiencing grief and loss.', 'short_answer', '[]', 'Pastoral grief ministry involves presence, listening, pointing to Christian hope, and providing ongoing support through the grief journey.', 11),

-- SPR201 Lesson 1: Biblical Foundation of Spiritual Gifts (360181)
(360181, 'Spiritual gifts are given by:', 'multiple_choice', '["Human effort","The Holy Spirit","Natural talent","Education"]', 'The Holy Spirit', 1),
(360181, 'The purpose of spiritual gifts is:', 'multiple_choice', '["Personal glory","Building up the body of Christ","Competition","Entertainment"]', 'Building up the body of Christ', 2),
(360181, 'According to 1 Corinthians 12, every believer has:', 'multiple_choice', '["No gifts","At least one spiritual gift","All gifts","Only one gift"]', 'At least one spiritual gift', 3),
(360181, 'The Greek word charisma means:', 'multiple_choice', '["Personality","Grace gift","Natural ability","Talent"]', 'Grace gift', 4),
(360181, 'Spiritual gifts differ from natural talents in their:', 'multiple_choice', '["Usefulness","Source and purpose for kingdom work","Value","Visibility"]', 'Source and purpose for kingdom work', 5),
(360181, 'The primary passages on spiritual gifts are found in:', 'multiple_choice', '["Genesis and Exodus","Romans 12, 1 Corinthians 12, Ephesians 4","Revelation","Psalms"]', 'Romans 12, 1 Corinthians 12, Ephesians 4', 6),
(360181, 'Love is essential in exercising gifts because:', 'multiple_choice', '["It is optional","Without love, gifts are meaningless","Love replaces gifts","It is just nice"]', 'Without love, gifts are meaningless', 7),
(360181, 'The body metaphor in 1 Corinthians 12 teaches:', 'multiple_choice', '["Some members are unnecessary","All members are needed and interdependent","Competition is good","Uniformity is the goal"]', 'All members are needed and interdependent', 8),
(360181, 'Spiritual gifts should be used with:', 'multiple_choice', '["Pride","Humility and for others benefit","Self-promotion","Competition"]', 'Humility and for others benefit', 9),
(360181, 'The distribution of gifts is determined by:', 'multiple_choice', '["Personal choice","The Holy Spirit as He wills","Church leaders","Popular vote"]', 'The Holy Spirit as He wills', 10),
(360181, 'Explain the biblical basis for spiritual gifts and their purpose in the church.', 'short_answer', '[]', 'Spiritual gifts are grace-given abilities from the Holy Spirit for building up the body of Christ and serving others.', 11),

-- SPR201 Lesson 2: The Motivational Gifts - Romans 12 (360182)
(360182, 'The gifts in Romans 12 are often called:', 'multiple_choice', '["Sign gifts","Motivational or service gifts","Leadership gifts","Miraculous gifts"]', 'Motivational or service gifts', 1),
(360182, 'The gift of prophecy in Romans 12 involves:', 'multiple_choice', '["Only predicting the future","Speaking Gods truth to edify and exhort","Fortune telling","Personal opinions"]', 'Speaking Gods truth to edify and exhort', 2),
(360182, 'The gift of serving emphasizes:', 'multiple_choice', '["Public recognition","Meeting practical needs of others","Self-promotion","Leadership positions"]', 'Meeting practical needs of others', 3),
(360182, 'The gift of teaching involves:', 'multiple_choice', '["Entertainment","Explaining and applying Scripture clearly","Personal stories only","Avoiding doctrine"]', 'Explaining and applying Scripture clearly', 4),
(360182, 'The gift of exhortation focuses on:', 'multiple_choice', '["Criticism","Encouraging and motivating others","Condemnation","Judgment"]', 'Encouraging and motivating others', 5),
(360182, 'The gift of giving should be exercised with:', 'multiple_choice', '["Reluctance","Generosity and cheerfulness","Expectation of return","Public display"]', 'Generosity and cheerfulness', 6),
(360182, 'The gift of leadership involves:', 'multiple_choice', '["Domination","Guiding and organizing with diligence","Passivity","Avoiding responsibility"]', 'Guiding and organizing with diligence', 7),
(360182, 'The gift of mercy is shown through:', 'multiple_choice', '["Judgment","Compassionate care for those suffering","Indifference","Criticism"]', 'Compassionate care for those suffering', 8),
(360182, 'Romans 12:6 says gifts differ according to:', 'multiple_choice', '["Personal preference","The grace given to us","Our effort","Church size"]', 'The grace given to us', 9),
(360182, 'Using gifts in proportion to faith means:', 'multiple_choice', '["Limiting God","Exercising gifts according to our faith and calling","Comparing with others","Overstepping boundaries"]', 'Exercising gifts according to our faith and calling', 10),
(360182, 'Describe the motivational gifts in Romans 12 and how they function in the church body.', 'short_answer', '[]', 'The Romans 12 gifts are motivational abilities that drive how believers serve, including prophecy, serving, teaching, exhorting, giving, leading, and showing mercy.', 11),

-- SPR201 Lesson 3: The Ministry Gifts - 1 Corinthians 12 (360183)
(360183, 'The gifts in 1 Corinthians 12 include:', 'multiple_choice', '["Only teaching","Word of wisdom, healing, tongues, and others","Only prophecy","Natural talents"]', 'Word of wisdom, healing, tongues, and others', 1),
(360183, 'The word of wisdom involves:', 'multiple_choice', '["Human intelligence","Supernatural insight for specific situations","Academic knowledge","Common sense only"]', 'Supernatural insight for specific situations', 2),
(360183, 'The word of knowledge refers to:', 'multiple_choice', '["General education","Supernatural revelation of facts","Book learning","Memory skills"]', 'Supernatural revelation of facts', 3),
(360183, 'The gift of faith is:', 'multiple_choice', '["Saving faith","Extraordinary trust in God for specific situations","Normal belief","Doubt"]', 'Extraordinary trust in God for specific situations', 4),
(360183, 'Gifts of healing are:', 'multiple_choice', '["Medical training","Supernatural ability to bring physical or emotional healing","Always successful","Under human control"]', 'Supernatural ability to bring physical or emotional healing', 5),
(360183, 'The gift of miracles involves:', 'multiple_choice', '["Magic tricks","Supernatural acts of power","Natural events","Human ability"]', 'Supernatural acts of power', 6),
(360183, 'Discerning of spirits enables believers to:', 'multiple_choice', '["Judge others","Distinguish between divine, human, and demonic sources","Ignore spiritual realities","Condemn people"]', 'Distinguish between divine, human, and demonic sources', 7),
(360183, 'Speaking in tongues in 1 Corinthians 12 is:', 'multiple_choice', '["Required for all","A spiritual gift for some believers","The only evidence of the Spirit","Meaningless"]', 'A spiritual gift for some believers', 8),
(360183, 'Interpretation of tongues:', 'multiple_choice', '["Is unnecessary","Makes tongues edifying in corporate worship","Is automatic","Replaces tongues"]', 'Makes tongues edifying in corporate worship', 9),
(360183, 'Paul emphasizes that not all have:', 'multiple_choice', '["Any gifts","The same gifts - diversity is Gods design","Value","Purpose"]', 'The same gifts - diversity is Gods design', 10),
(360183, 'Explain the manifestation gifts in 1 Corinthians 12 and guidelines for their use.', 'short_answer', '[]', 'The manifestation gifts are supernatural abilities given by the Spirit for ministry, to be used in love and order for edification.', 11),

-- SPR201 Lesson 4: The Leadership Gifts - Ephesians 4 (360184)
(360184, 'The Ephesians 4 gifts are given to:', 'multiple_choice', '["All believers equally","Specific individuals for church leadership","Only pastors","No one today"]', 'Specific individuals for church leadership', 1),
(360184, 'Apostles in Ephesians 4 are:', 'multiple_choice', '["Only the Twelve","Those sent to establish and oversee churches","Extinct","Unimportant"]', 'Those sent to establish and oversee churches', 2),
(360184, 'Prophets in Ephesians 4:', 'multiple_choice', '["Only predict the future","Speak Gods word to edify, exhort, and comfort","Are no longer needed","Replace Scripture"]', 'Speak Gods word to edify, exhort, and comfort', 3),
(360184, 'Evangelists are gifted to:', 'multiple_choice', '["Only preach to Christians","Proclaim the gospel and win the lost","Stay in one location","Avoid non-believers"]', 'Proclaim the gospel and win the lost', 4),
(360184, 'Pastors in Ephesians 4 are:', 'multiple_choice', '["Hired employees","Shepherds who care for and feed the flock","Optional","Only administrators"]', 'Shepherds who care for and feed the flock', 5),
(360184, 'Teachers in Ephesians 4:', 'multiple_choice', '["Share opinions","Explain and apply Scripture for understanding","Entertain","Avoid doctrine"]', 'Explain and apply Scripture for understanding', 6),
(360184, 'The purpose of these leadership gifts is to:', 'multiple_choice', '["Create hierarchy","Equip the saints for ministry","Control the church","Gain power"]', 'Equip the saints for ministry', 7),
(360184, 'The goal is for the body to reach:', 'multiple_choice', '["Numerical growth only","Unity and maturity in Christ","Entertainment","Comfort"]', 'Unity and maturity in Christ', 8),
(360184, 'Pastor-teacher may be:', 'multiple_choice', '["Two separate gifts","One combined gift","Neither","Outdated"]', 'One combined gift', 9),
(360184, 'These gifts continue until:', 'multiple_choice', '["The apostles died","The church reaches full maturity in Christ","They are no longer needed","The pastor retires"]', 'The church reaches full maturity in Christ', 10),
(360184, 'Explain the leadership gifts in Ephesians 4 and their role in equipping the church.', 'short_answer', '[]', 'The Ephesians 4 gifts are leadership roles given to equip believers for ministry and build up the body toward maturity in Christ.', 11),

-- SPR201 Lesson 5: Discovering Your Spiritual Gifts (360185)
(360185, 'Discovering your spiritual gifts involves:', 'multiple_choice', '["Taking one test","Prayer, study, experience, and confirmation","Guessing","Ignoring the topic"]', 'Prayer, study, experience, and confirmation', 1),
(360185, 'Spiritual gift assessments are:', 'multiple_choice', '["Infallible","Helpful tools but not definitive","Unnecessary","The only way to know"]', 'Helpful tools but not definitive', 2),
(360185, 'Serving in various ministries helps:', 'multiple_choice', '["Nothing","Discover where your gifts are effective","Waste time","Avoid commitment"]', 'Discover where your gifts are effective', 3),
(360185, 'Confirmation from others is important because:', 'multiple_choice', '["It is optional","Others can see gifts we may not recognize","It replaces personal discernment","It is the only factor"]', 'Others can see gifts we may not recognize', 4),
(360185, 'Spiritual gifts should align with:', 'multiple_choice', '["Personal ambition only","Your passions and the churchs needs","Financial gain","Popularity"]', 'Your passions and the churchs needs', 5),
(360185, 'Developing your gifts requires:', 'multiple_choice', '["No effort","Practice, training, and faithful use","Ignoring them","Waiting for perfection"]', 'Practice, training, and faithful use', 6),
(360185, 'Every believer is called to:', 'multiple_choice', '["Only receive ministry","Use their gifts to serve others","Avoid ministry","Wait for a special calling"]', 'Use their gifts to serve others', 7),
(360185, 'Gifts can be neglected by:', 'multiple_choice', '["Using them","Failing to exercise and develop them","Prayer","Study"]', 'Failing to exercise and develop them', 8),
(360185, 'The church benefits when:', 'multiple_choice', '["Only leaders serve","All members use their gifts","Gifts are hidden","Competition exists"]', 'All members use their gifts', 9),
(360185, 'Stewardship of gifts means:', 'multiple_choice', '["Ignoring them","Faithfully using what God has given","Hoarding abilities","Self-promotion"]', 'Faithfully using what God has given', 10),
(360185, 'Describe the process of discovering and developing your spiritual gifts for effective ministry.', 'short_answer', '[]', 'Discovering gifts involves prayer, study, experimentation, and confirmation, followed by faithful development and use for Gods glory.', 11);
